body.summary: Review LOCK 009 spec for Tripp.Control governance trace/decision record module.
body.context: Tripp.Control is a local-first governance spine for multi-agent builds. LOCK 009 adds deterministic governance trace + decision record layer. This is for YOUR local machine (D:\Echos.House\builds\apps\Tripp.Control).
body.your_job: Review the LOCK 009 spec from a local-execution safety perspective. Focus on: what could go wrong if this runs on your machine? What safety checks should exist? Return your feedback as structured review items.
body.output_format: JSON response with review_items array. Each item: {severity, category, description, suggestion}
